new: Added localization support for international players
changes: Refactored major portions of the codebase to improve stability and maintainability
Overhauled the anti-cheat system to improve detection accuracy and reliability
bugs: Resolved multiple runtime errors that could disrupt gameplay

new: Added dynamic spawning based on player count
changes: Reduced the effectiveness of the Whiskorian variant: Pimple
bugs: Resolved an issue that could cause vehicles to fly unexpectedly
Resolved a silent error affecting broken weapon gamepasses
Fixed an issue that prevented Whiskorians from appearing on the map
Fixed an issue that prevented Whiskorians from attacking during continuous contact
Fixed the callout enabled setting

changes: Reduced network latency and overhead by 60% to 75%
Improved server and client performance, freeing 2 to 5 frames
Increased server capacity from 25 to 32 players
Reduced vehicle damage caused by Whiskorians by 90%
bugs: Fixed a premium benefits logic issue that incorrectly granted 4x rewards
misc: Overall game stability and performance have been significantly improved
Improved server stability to support longer uptime with fewer slowdowns
footnotes: Stability may vary while this update is being monitored

changes: Reduced ammo crate interaction time from 3s to 0.1s
bugs: Fixed various bugs and made general codebase improvements
footnotes: The Mechanical Grenadier has been replaced based on player feedback
Previous Mechanical Grenadier owners will receive the Hand Charge for free

bugs: Fixed blocky ragdolls after death

new: Added universal gyroscopic stabilization for turrets
bugs: Adjusted aiming and firing alignment so weapons shoot more accurately
Fixed ghost driving
Fixed helicopter tooltips
Fixed callout activation

new: Added a callout menu with settings (V)
changes: Adjusted how vehicle health is affected when running over Whiskorians
bugs: Fixed Whiskorian-related vehicle damage behavior
Fixed camera interference while operating vehicles

changes: Readjusted attachment balance so all attachments now include tradeoffs
bugs: Fixed several issues involving vehicle-to-player collisions
Fixed several respawn issues
Fixed several main menu issues
Fixed an issue that allowed weapon duplication while seated
Fixed the excessive suspension height on the LTV-300
Fixed an issue with sight placement during reloads
Fixed an issue involving explosion craters in the boss den
Fixed false-positive anti-cheat bans
Fixed the toggle aim keybind (P key / mobile button)
Fixed capture UI scaling across all devices
footnotes: Refill stations have been deferred to the next update

new: Added small trench bridges across the map
changes: Renamed vehicle: MBT-52 Panthera to MBT-800
Renamed vehicle: RR-20P Sentinel to ACV-120
Reduced gore intensity to preserve performance
Optimized explosion networking to reduce server lag
bugs: Fixed an issue that caused inventory duplication when entering or exiting vehicles
footnotes: Anti-cheat improvements have been deferred to the next update

new: Added the contributor factor to the Whiskorian boss fight
Added additional creators to the credits
Added a vignette overlay to the AX-50 scope
changes: Increased ammunition canister capacity from 5k to 10k
bugs: Fixed an issue that caused territories to remain stuck at 6/7
Fixed an issue involving a secondary weapon challenge
Fixed an issue affecting loadout saves
Fixed overlapping text in the credits
Fixed a vehicle issue where owners leaving caused weapons to disappear
Fixed engine audio
Fixed an issue that exposed the qaAdmin panel to unintended users
Fixed an issue affecting the Arms Dealer badge
Fixed an issue affecting leaderboard updates
Permanently fixed an issue that allowed Whiskorians to access weapons (shooting as a Whiskorian now results in an auto-ban)
footnotes: Iron sight adjustments have been deferred to the next update
Weapon loadout datastores were wiped with this update

changes: Revamped and reinforced the purchase backend for gamepasses and developer products
Updated the Mechanical Grenadier explosion VFX
bugs: Fixed an issue that prevented SkyDrop from spawning
Fixed an issue that caused the den to count territories incorrectly
Fixed an issue that prevented Whiskorians from spawning correctly
Fixed an issue that caused the Remington Rolling Block to cock back slowly
Fixed the incorrect ammo type for the VSS Vintorez
Fixed the incorrect ammo type for the RPK-74
footnotes: "NEW" loadout tags have been deferred to the next update
The Double-Barrel is currently known to be broken and does not need to be reported

new: Added server location display to the main menu
Added game version display to the main menu
changes: Relaxed anti-alt detection to support higher player counts
Increased the default ADS FOV for sniper rifles
bugs: Fixed an issue involving building collisions
Fixed an issue that caused the Whiskorian count to increase exponentially after each round or death
Fixed an issue that prevented explosion splash damage from working
Fixed the black screen of death
Resolved a recurring invalid sound issue

changes: Converted the MBT-52 Panthera to a one-man vehicle
Converted the RR-20P Sentinel to a one-man vehicle
bugs: Fixed an issue that prevented vehicle armaments from damaging Whiskorians
Fixed an issue that allowed Whiskorians to mount SkyDrop vehicles
footnotes: The fix for exponential Whiskorian count growth has been deferred to the next update
The fix for hitmarkers affecting teammates and dead humanoids has been deferred to the next update

new: Added an in-game suggestions and feedback system
changes: Changed the unstance keybind from Space to X
Adjusted the feel of the M249
Corrected the Thompson M1928 magazine type
bugs: Fixed an issue that prevented the boss from functioning after one round
Fixed a leaderboard loading issue
Fixed a critical issue that allowed Whiskorians to wield weapons
Fixed a critical issue that prevented console players from selecting SkyDrop vehicles
Resolved bullet raycasting issues so Whiskorians no longer absorb excessive shots

new: Added an interactive map with mobile support, zoom, and a legend
Added persistent settings: aim sensitivity, graphics mode, tooltips, level UI, bloom, color correction, sunrays, camera shake
Added non-persistent settings: DOOM music and impact effects
Added global leaderboards for Cash, Kills, and XP
Added the Defenders and Whiskorians teams
Added commands: qaAirstrike1–4, qaCaptureAllFlags, qaResetAllFlags, qaRoundID, qaClockTime
Added Whiskorian variants: Normal, Pimple, Watcher
Added 48-minute rounds to the core game loop
Re-added craters with a 3-minute despawn timer
Added vehicle interactions for toppling and running over Whiskorians and trees
Added contributor tag for bug reporters
changes: Converted Whiskorians from R15 to R6
Reduced Whiskorian attack range from 10 studs to 5 studs
Reduced Whiskorian attack damage from 15 to 12.5
Increased Whiskorian attack cooldown from 1.3s to 1.4s
Increased Whiskorian respawn time from 4–6s to 10–15s
Increased territory decay rate from 0.002 to 0.003
Increased ammo reserves for gamepass weapons
Changed premium benefits payout from 10k to 5k
Changed default aim sensitivity from 0.4 to 0.5
Changed stance transition time from 0.45s to 0.3s
Changed body despawn time from 30s to 8s
Changed blood color from red/dark red to pink/magenta
Readjusted ambience, flag audio, Whiskorian audio, terrain, and ADS speed
Redesigned the chatbox, mobile controls, bullet casing models, both rivers, and muzzle flashes
Overhauled visual graphics, gamepass logic, and the shop UI
Refreshed all UI sounds and house models
Reworked the Weapon, Main Menu, Loadout, and Deploy UIs
Refreshed the Notification, Vehicle, and Capture UIs
Reworked reload animations for the AK and AR

Refreshed and readjusted the following weapons: AK-12, AK-74, AR-15, VSS Vintorez, M1911A1, Python, Z Custom, Five-seveN, P90, G36, G17 w/ Shield, G18, G19, Kar98k, Vector, L86A1, M16A2, Mechanical Grenadier, M4A1, M61 Vulcan, MK1 Carbine, M91/30, PPSh-41, RPG-7, RPK-74, P320, Saiga-12, Schwarzlose M.1898, Walther P99 AS, Thompson M1928
bugs: Fixed Furrow's broken flag
Fixed craters
Fixed Whiskorian ragdolls
Fixed mobile input for vehicle controls
Fixed the Whiskorian attack animation
Fixed issues with premium benefits
Fixed an issue that caused player accessories to unanchor on death
Fixed an issue that allowed Whiskorians to attack undeployed players
Fixed instant chambering during tactical reloads
Fixed a firing issue when equipping and unequipping weapons
Fixed an ADS issue when equipping and unequipping weapons
Fixed the loadout guard so players can no longer deploy without a weapon
removals: Removed Whiskorian decapitation chance (replaced with impact effects)
Removed Whiskorian variants: Tank, Mini, Normal (legacy)
misc: Overhauled and strengthened the anti-cheat system
footnotes: Barrel, Underbarrel, and Bipod attachments remain listed as coming soon

new: Added a developer panel for private server owners
bugs: Fixed broken animations
Fixed menu reset issues
Fixed a bloom lighting glitch
Fixed additional loading screen issues
Resolved an infinite loop in the loading screen logic

changes: Overhauled the respawn and death system
bugs: Resolved the long-standing broken alt detection issue
removals: Temporarily removed free daily premium cash
footnotes: This update was released earlier than intended due to internal conflict

changes: Refactored the frontend and backend codebase

new: Added a Rainbow Carpet at the finish
Added a Flying Cloud at the finish
changes: Increased the stage cap from 50 to 51
Added logic to the invisible map boundaries
bugs: Resolved a minor gamepass issue affecting tools on join
